response.overview: Emma, a young doctor at a childrens' hospital in Sweden during the 1960s, returns to her work after a few months leave. There, she meets the young boy Timmy who recently lost both his parents in a car accident. But when Timmy mysteriously disappears during the night, she and the other workes have to search the deserted corridors for him, while also delving deeper into the hospital's dark past.
response.title: Förgät Mig Ej
